推荐场景: 播客访谈间｜回答主持人问题
60秒任务: 「采访问题」：问题/观点/例子/总结；A=听懂潜台词并稳住关系；B=误判立场/过度直接翻车。
目标功能: 访谈｜观点展开｜例证｜反方观点｜总结｜态度识别
场景族: 新闻短片｜播客访谈｜公共广播｜活动现场｜屏幕公告
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
Can you tell us what led to ___?（追问起因）
What was going through your mind when ___?（追问心理）
How do you respond to people who say ___?（回应质疑）
Could you give us some background?（请求背景）
What makes this issue important now?（说明时效性）
Can you walk us through the main challenge?（解释挑战）
Who is most affected by this?（关注受影响者）
What do you wish people understood?（深层追问）
How has your view changed over time?（观点变化）
Can you give a concrete example?（请求例子）
What happens next?（下一步）
Is there anything you’d like to clarify?（澄清）
How should listeners interpret ___?（引导理解）
What would you say to critics?（回应批评）
Thank you for joining us.（访谈收尾）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: interview, question, background, challenge, listener, critic, issue, example
Verbs: ask, respond, explain, clarify, interpret, affect, change, walk through
Adjectives / Tone: important, controversial, personal, concrete, public, recent
Time / Place: now, over time, next, on the podcast, at the event
Chunks: what led to, going through your mind, concrete example, respond to critics, joining us
